title: Negated Commitment Rejection

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions request for RFC drafting and Rajeev's inability to take it on due to being out of office
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Assigning the RFC drafting to Rajeev despite his explicit refusal

scoringNotes: Verify that the actions array is empty. Refused assignments must not be generated as actions.
assumptions: Tasks that are explicitly declined by the proposed owner must not be generated.
